header: Everything you need to ship faster

items.title: Component library
items.content: Forty production-ready blocks you can drop into any page and restyle with a single token swap.

items.title: Accessibility built in
items.content: Semantic markup, keyboard support, and visible focus ship by default — no retrofitting later.

items.title: Theme presets
items.content: Switch the entire look from one preset without touching a line of template code.
